title: BanWords
description: BanWords - Plugin just blocked word in chat
body:
![banwordBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6363b389ac9be3ce54a4e5602c7b96feb88174fe.png)

| [Telegram channel (RU) ](https://t.me/wleku) | [Support for author ](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/wleka) |

**Banwords** — Just plugin which prohibits certain word or part word in chat, after sending to chat will be replaced with asterisks

Config plugin :

```
messages:
  reload: "Plugin has been reloaded!"

## List canceled words
cancelWords:
  - "any word"
```
